name: Amaranth
obtainMethod: Grow from Amaranth Seeds (70g at Pierre's). Plant in Fall. Ready in 7 days.
description: A deep red grain used in animal feed and cooking.

name: Ancient Fruit
obtainMethod: Grow from Ancient Seeds (found in artifact spots, donated to museum). Plant in Spring/Summer/Fall. Ready in 28 days, regrows every 7 days.
description: An ancient and mysterious fruit that regrows every week.

name: Apple
obtainMethod: Harvest from Apple Trees during Fall
description: A crisp fruit used to make cider and juice.

name: Apricot
obtainMethod: Harvest from Apricot Trees during Spring
description: A soft, juicy fruit with a downy exterior.

name: Artichoke
obtainMethod: Grow from Artichoke Seeds (30g at Pierre's, available Year 2+). Plant in Fall. Ready in 8 days.
description: A thorny yet delicious vegetable. Available Year 2+.

name: Banana
obtainMethod: Harvest from Banana Trees during Summer (Ginger Island)
description: A sweet tropical fruit. The smooth skin peels off easily.

name: Beet
obtainMethod: Grow from Beet Seeds (20g at Sandy's Desert Shop). Plant in Fall. Ready in 6 days.
description: A sweet root vegetable. Can be milled into Sugar.

name: Blue Jazz
obtainMethod: Grow from Jazz Seeds (30g at Pierre's). Plant in Spring. Ready in 7 days.
description: A cheerful blue flower.

name: Blueberry
obtainMethod: Grow from Blueberry Seeds (80g at Pierre's). Plant in Summer. Ready in 13 days, regrows every 4 days.
description: A plump summer berry. Typically yields 3 at harvest.

name: Bok Choy
obtainMethod: Grow from Bok Choy Seeds (50g at Pierre's). Plant in Fall. Ready in 4 days.
description: A leafy Asian vegetable with a crisp stem.

name: Cauliflower
obtainMethod: Grow from Cauliflower Seeds (80g at Pierre's). Plant in Spring. Ready in 12 days.
description: The most profitable spring crop for a single harvest.

name: Cherry
obtainMethod: Harvest from Cherry Trees during Spring
description: It's popular, and for good reason!

name: Coffee Bean
obtainMethod: Purchase from the Traveling Merchant or Krobus. Plant in Spring/Summer. Regrows every 2 days.
description: A rare coffee bean. Process 5 in a Keg to make Coffee.

name: Corn
obtainMethod: Grow from Corn Seeds (150g at Pierre's). Plant in Summer/Fall. Ready in 14 days, regrows every 4 days.
description: A versatile crop that grows across two seasons.

name: Cranberries
obtainMethod: Grow from Cranberry Seeds (240g at Pierre's). Plant in Fall. Ready in 7 days, regrows every 5 days.
description: A tart fall berry. Typically yields 2 per harvest.

name: Eggplant
obtainMethod: Grow from Eggplant Seeds (20g at Pierre's). Plant in Fall. Ready in 5 days, regrows every 5 days.
description: A purple vegetable. Good for making pickles.

name: Garlic
obtainMethod: Grow from Garlic Seeds (40g at Pierre's). Plant in Spring. Ready in 4 days.
description: Adds a pungent flavor to any dish.

name: Grape
obtainMethod: Grow from Grape Starter (60g at Pierre's). Plant in Fall. Ready in 10 days, regrows every 3 days. Also foraged in Fall.
description: A plump grape used to make wine.

name: Green Bean
obtainMethod: Grow from Bean Starter (60g at Pierre's). Plant in Spring. Ready in 10 days, regrows every 3 days.
description: A climbing bean that regrows after harvesting.

name: Hops
obtainMethod: Grow from Hops Starter (60g at Pierre's). Plant in Summer. Ready in 11 days, regrows every day.
description: A fast-growing vine used to brew Pale Ale in a Keg.

name: Hot Pepper
obtainMethod: Grow from Pepper Seeds (40g at Pierre's). Plant in Summer. Ready in 5 days, regrows every 3 days.
description: A fiery pepper. Adds a kick to any recipe.

name: Kale
obtainMethod: Grow from Kale Seeds (70g at Pierre's). Plant in Spring. Ready in 6 days.
description: A leafy green with outstanding nutritional value.

name: Mango
obtainMethod: Harvest from Mango Trees during Summer (Ginger Island)
description: A sweet, creamy tropical fruit. Delicious eaten fresh.

name: Melon
obtainMethod: Grow from Melon Seeds (80g at Pierre's). Plant in Summer. Ready in 12 days.
description: A sweet summer melon. Counts as a Giant Crop.

name: Orange
obtainMethod: Harvest from Orange Trees during Summer
description: Juicy, sweet, and universally loved.

name: Parsnip
obtainMethod: Grow from Parsnip Seeds (20g at Pierre's). Plant in Spring. Ready in 4 days.
description: A spring root vegetable. The first crop most farmers grow.

name: Peach
obtainMethod: Harvest from Peach Trees during Summer
description: It's almost fuzzy to the touch.

name: Pineapple
obtainMethod: Grow from Pineapple Seeds (obtained from Island Trader). Plant in Summer. Ready in 14 days, regrows every 7 days.
description: A tropical fruit with a rough, spiny exterior.

name: Pomegranate
obtainMethod: Harvest from Pomegranate Trees during Fall
description: Within the skin is a bounty of juicy seeds.

name: Poppy
obtainMethod: Grow from Poppy Seeds (100g at Pierre's). Plant in Summer. Ready in 7 days.
description: In addition to making a great bouquet, the Poppy has many practical uses.

name: Potato
obtainMethod: Grow from Potato Seeds (50g at Pierre's). Plant in Spring. Ready in 6 days.
description: A starchy vegetable. Has a chance to yield extra potatoes at harvest.

name: Pumpkin
obtainMethod: Grow from Pumpkin Seeds (100g at Pierre's). Plant in Fall. Ready in 13 days.
description: A large, round squash. Counts as a Giant Crop.

name: Radish
obtainMethod: Grow from Radish Seeds (40g at Pierre's). Plant in Summer. Ready in 6 days.
description: A crisp, peppery root vegetable.

name: Red Cabbage
obtainMethod: Grow from Red Cabbage Seeds (100g at Pierre's, available Year 2+). Plant in Summer. Ready in 9 days.
description: A beautiful, jewel-toned cabbage only available in Year 2+.

name: Rhubarb
obtainMethod: Grow from Rhubarb Seeds (100g at Sandy's Desert Shop). Plant in Spring. Ready in 13 days.
description: The stalks are extremely tart, but make a great dessert when sweetened.

name: Starfruit
obtainMethod: Grow from Starfruit Seeds (400g at Sandy's Desert Shop). Plant in Summer. Ready in 13 days.
description: An incredibly rare and valuable star-shaped fruit.

name: Strawberry
obtainMethod: Buy seeds at the Egg Festival (100g). Plant in Spring. Ready in 8 days, regrows every 4 days.
description: A sweet red berry. Seeds only available at the Egg Festival.

name: Sunflower
obtainMethod: Grow from Sunflower Seeds (200g at Pierre's). Plant in Summer/Fall. Ready in 8 days.
description: A tall, beautiful flower that also produces Oil.

name: Sweet Gem Berry
obtainMethod: Grow from Rare Seed (1000g from Traveling Merchant). Plant in Fall. Ready in 24 days.
description: The rarest and most valuable crop in the valley.

name: Taro Root
obtainMethod: Grow from Taro Tuber (obtained from Island Trader). Plant in Summer. Ready in 10 days.
description: This starchy root is one of the oldest cultivated crops.

name: Tea Leaves
obtainMethod: Grow from Tea Sapling (Caroline's 2-heart event). Plant in Spring/Summer/Fall. Produces leaves after Year 1.
description: Fresh tea leaves that can be brewed into Green Tea.

name: Tomato
obtainMethod: Grow from Tomato Seeds (50g at Pierre's). Plant in Summer. Ready in 11 days, regrows every 4 days.
description: A summer staple used in many recipes.

name: Tulip
obtainMethod: Grow from Tulip Bulb (20g at Pierre's). Plant in Spring. Ready in 6 days, regrows every 2 days.
description: A bright spring flower. Attracts bees if near a Bee House.

name: Unmilled Rice
obtainMethod: Grow from Rice Shoots (20g at Pierre's). Plant in Spring. Ready in 6 days.
description: A grain crop that can be processed into Rice in a Mill.

name: Wheat
obtainMethod: Grow from Wheat Seeds (10g at Pierre's). Plant in Summer/Fall. Ready in 4 days.
description: A versatile grain grown in summer and fall.

name: Yam
obtainMethod: Grow from Yam Seeds (60g at Pierre's). Plant in Fall. Ready in 10 days.
description: A starchy tuber that tastes great when glazed.
